ministry: Ministry of Finance (Department of Posts / Banks)
summary_hi: बेटी के नाम पर खुलने वाला बचत खाता जो 21 साल में मैच्योर होता है। 8.2% सालाना ब्याज, टैक्स-फ्री।

chunks.text: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY / सुकन्या समृद्धि योजना) is a small-savings scheme for a girl child below age 10. Parent or legal guardian opens the account at any post office or authorised bank in the daughter's name. Current interest rate is 8.2% per annum (effective from 1 January 2024), compounded yearly. Interest is fully tax-free under Section 80C; deposits also qualify for 80C deduction up to ₹1,50,000 per year. Account matures 21 years from opening date. Bachat khaata beti ke naam par khulta hai aur 21 saal mein mature hota hai.

Eligibility for Sukanya Samriddhi: The girl child must be an Indian citizen and below 10 years of age at the time of opening. Only one account per girl child is allowed; a family can open accounts for a maximum of two girl children (exception: twins/triplets). Account can be opened by natural or legal guardian. Patrata: beti ki umar 10 saal se kam honi chahiye, beti Bharat ki nagrik ho, ek beti ke naam par sirf ek hi account khul sakta hai, ek parivar mein maximum 2 betiyon ka account.

Benefits of Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana: Minimum deposit ₹250 per year, maximum ₹1,50,000 per financial year. Deposits allowed for first 15 years from opening; account earns interest for 21 years. Interest rate 8.2% p.a. (Q4 FY 2023-24 onwards). Partial withdrawal up to 50% allowed after the girl turns 18 for higher education. Account can be closed prematurely for marriage after age 18. Faayda: kam se kam 250 rupaye saalana se shuru, zyada se zyada 1.5 lakh saalana, 8.2% byaaj, 18 saal ke baad padhai ke liye 50% nikal sakte hain, shaadi par account band karwa sakte hain.

Documents required to open Sukanya Samriddhi account: (1) Girl child's birth certificate. (2) Identity proof of parent/guardian (Aadhaar / PAN / Voter ID / Passport). (3) Address proof of parent/guardian. (4) Passport-size photograph of girl child and guardian. (5) Filled SSY application form (Form-1). Kagazaat: beti ka janm pramaan patra, mata-pita ka Aadhaar ya pehchaan patra, pata ka praman, photo, aur SSY ka Form-1.

How to apply for Sukanya Samriddhi: Visit any India Post office or designated branch of an authorised bank (SBI, PNB, ICICI, HDFC, Axis, BoB, BoI, Canara, etc.). Collect Form-1 (also downloadable from indiapost.gov.in). Submit the form with documents and initial deposit (min ₹250). Account passbook is issued. Online deposit thereafter via IPPB / bank netbanking. Kaise apply karein: nazdeeki post office ya bank shakha jaayein, Form-1 bhar ke documents ke saath jama karein, kam se kam 250 rupaye se khaata khulwayein.

Sukanya Samriddhi maturity rules: Account matures 21 years from date of opening, irrespective of girl's age at maturity. Premature closure allowed only on death of account-holder, life-threatening disease of girl, or death of guardian; otherwise account stays open earning interest till 21 years. Account can be transferred between post office and banks free of cost on the girl's address change. Maturity par poora paisa byaaj ke saath beti ko milta hai - ye paisa shaadi ya higher education ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai.

For Sukanya Samriddhi queries, contact your post office or bank branch. National toll-free helpline for postal small savings: 1800-266-6868. Beti Bachao Beti Padhao helpline (related government initiative): 14434. Online tracking via India Post IPPB app.
